channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
A bag of rubbish and pot paint has been left on the public footpath going between Great Elms Road and Wellington Road Bromley BR2 9NG and between houses 17 and 19 Wellington Road BR2 9NG
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflows bins, 16th March
item.description:
When are you going to do something about this? Or do I need to email the councillor or MP?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chelmer Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded paint & drug paraphernalia, 16th March
item.description:
Tub of paint splattered and further paint hidden in the alleyway. Always drug paraphernalia & little down the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Drive, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three parking signs now blacked out, 16th March
item.description:
We pay a lot of money for residents parking, so please come and replace these signs ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fielding Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Africa Centre leaving rubbish on street, 16th March
item.description:
Someone keeps leaving bags of food waste in Old Union Yard Arches outside their bin storage. This is then blown all over, opened by vermin and the food waste scattered all over. We have chicken bones outside our office door. This has happened over the weekend and we have come into work on Monday to find the premises who has done this closed so the rubbish will be there until tomorrow when they open. Its attracting vermin and its utterly disgusting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severely damaged road surface spanning over 20sqm, 16th March
item.description:
There are serious failures in the road surface and multiple potholes over an area of over 20sqm. When driving cars have to veer left/right to avoid and this is dangerous with parked cars and other oncoming cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Torrington Park, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1ft pothole, 16th March
item.description:
Pothole on kings avenue junction of Atkins road if gets bigger will cause potential damage for bus routes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Atkins Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building sign swinging loose with heavy wood on the sign., 16th March
item.description:
If this sign comes loose off the building, it could cause an injury to someone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tree branches, 16th March
item.description:
Lots of sharp tree branches have been dumped on the road. Hazardous for children. Coukdpotentially be blinded. Bottom of Shawbury road outside pedder estate agent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering and rubbish strewn up Brodrick grove, 16th March
item.description:
I couldn’t attach all the photos but there is rubbish dumped on the corner, alcohol bottles strewn all around the junction - some smashed in the road, and litter all the way up Brodrick Grove - particularly on the lower end of the hill.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brodrick Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of crafts and detritus, 16th March
item.description:
Accumulated detritus and litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Taxi Idling for over 20 mins, 16th March
item.description:
Vehicle has been idling for over 20 mins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Gloucester Terrace, Paddington, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin spilling out on to street, 16th March
item.description:
Please can you resolve this? There’s an overflowing household bin, and food and rubbish are strewn across the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleansing required - backlines, 16th March
item.description:
Detritus build up along the backlines (the wall) starting from Broomfield Road headed down gravel hill l (same side as speed camera). Backlines require a scrape and sweep to remove detritus that has built up from the unswept footpath. Thank you for helping to keep the borough clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light not working, 16th March
item.description:
Street light isn't working on the slip path and resident says it is very dark there of a night time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manordene Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in the middle of the road, 16th March
item.description:
This pothole is particularly dangerous as cars are parking on both sides of the road which forces roads users to use the middle of the road. Please note that over the past few months, there were an accelerated delamination of the tarmac of the left side of the road when going towards Spa Fields.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Northampton Road, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road damaged, 16th March
item.description:
Many parts of Northend Rd junction with colyers Lane and Bridge Rd have missing tarmac between both lanes south bound dangerous for motorcyclists, also pedestrian crossing on middle island on Northend Rd has poor surface as you cross from island to pavement corner of bridge Rd, a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter & tree trunk by commercial bin, 16th March
item.description:
Someone deposited a cut down tree trunk and also a lot of household litter. Very unsightly and right outside the church’s garden gate and steps to the main church entrance. Thank you!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedding in the curb Haslemere Rd/Long Lane B'Heath, 16th March
item.description:
Bedding in the curb Haslemere Rd/Long Lane B'Heath - also alleyway r/o shops in Long Lane there are 4 pillows
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Haslemere Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Premier Corner by the M&S Store, 16th March
item.description:
Deep and large potholes on the road that are creating a serious danger for road users and buses. The potholes have become very deep and wide, making it difficult for vehicles to pass safely. Needs to actioned matter of urgency

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
